Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

STT 2, 406 [Memorandum concerning votive donations][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[...] d15 ša iriḫu-⸢zir⸣-ri-i-ni

[...] Ištar of Huzirina

o 22

[...] dNUSKA ⸢e⸣-di-nu-ni

[...] he gave [...] Nusku.

o 33

[...] DUMU mse-⸢e⸣—dil-li-ni lu₂NINDA

[...], son of Seʾ-dillini, the baker;

o 44

[...] x lu₂KAŠ.LUL

[...], the cup-bearer;

o 55

[...] lu₂P₂<(KAŠ.LUL)> x

[...], ditto (the cup-bearer);

o 66

[...] lu₂MUḪALDIM

[...], the cook;

o 77

[...]-i [...] mka-bar—⸢iš⸣-di lu₂P₂<(MUḪALDIM)>

[...] ... [...] Kabar-išdi, ditto (the cook);

o 88

mna-aṣ-ra-a DUMU m⸢qa⸣-ar-ḫa-a-a [...]

Naṣraya, son of Qarhaya, [...];

o 99

mna-ni-i DUMU mli-[x-(x)]-su ⸢lu₂⸣[...]

Naniyi, son of PN, the [...];

o 1010

⸢m⸣mi-⸢ni⸣—UMUN?i ⸢DUMU⸣ [mx-(x)]-še?-i [...]

Mini-beli, son of PN, [...];

o 1111

mx-[...]-⸢li? DUMU⸣ [mx-(x)]-x-la-su [...]

PN, son of PN, [...];

o 1212

[...]-ma-ʾa-x [...]

[...] PN, [...];

(5 lines missing)
o 13'13'

mx-[...]

PN [...];

o 14'14'

mqar-ḫa-a DUMU m[...]

Qarhaya, son of [PN ...];

o 15'15'

mdNUSKA—še-zib-a-an ⸢DUMU⸣ m[...]

Nusku-šezibanni, son of [PN ...];

o 16'16'

mbir—ia-ta-a-te DUMU mx-[...]

Bir-yatate, son of [PN ...];

o 17'17'

mna-ḫu-šu—su-ri DUMU m10—[...]

Nahuš-suri, son of Adad-[...];

o 18'18'

mre-ḫi-me—U.U DUMU mDINGIR—gab-[bi-ri ...]

Rehime-Dadi, son of Il-gabbiri [...];

o 19'19'

md⸢NUSKA⸣—a!-ia-li DUMU ma-x-[...]

Nusku-ayali, son of [PN ...];

o 20'20'

mše-er—ba-rak-ki ⸢DUMU⸣ [m...]

Šer-barakki, son of [PN ...];

o 21'21'

mda-nu!—ZALAG₂ [...]1

Anu-nuri [...];

o 22'22'

mmu-x-(x)-ša [...]

... [...]

o 23'23'

ma-u₂-i-ra?-a ⸢DUMU⸣ [m...]

Auiraya, son of [PN ...];

o 24'24'

mse-e—i-ta DUMU [m...]

Šeʾ-ita, son of [PN ...];

Reverse
r 1r 1

[m...]-x DUMU ⸢m⸣x-[...]

[PN], son of [PN ...];

r 22

[...]-x-ni DUMU m?DINGIR-x-x [...]

PN, son of PN [...];

r 33

mal-li-i munusma-ra-sa [...]

Alliyi, daughter of [PN ...];

r 44

md⸢MAŠ?⸣—MU—AŠ DUMU mḫa-ni-[i ...]

Ninurta-šum-iddin, son of Haniyi [...];

r 55

mbar—x-x DUMU mU.U—x-[...]

PN, son of Dadi-... [...];

r 66

mdar-u₂-as—ma-a-di ⸢DUMU⸣ mDINGIR-u₂?-x-[...]

Aruas-madi, son of PN [...];

r 77

ma-⸢tar⸣—x-x-i x [...]

PN ... [...];

r 88

mDINGIR—gab-bi-⸢ri⸣ DUMU fa-ḫa-ta-a [...]

Il-gabbiri, son of Ahataya [...];

r 99

m30—x-i DUMU mEN—KASKAL—DINGIRe [...]

Sin-..., son of Bel-Harran-ile [...];

r 1010

mu₂-ra-a-⸢su⸣ DUMU msi-i-[...]

Urasu, son of PN [...];

r 1111

[m...]-x—SILIMan-ni DUMU mse-e—la-u-a-[ni ...]

...-šallimanni, son of Seʾ-lauani [...];

r 1212

[...] mpa-ḫi-⸢ir?⸣-[...]

[...]-pahir [...]

(3 lines missing)
r 13'13'

mbi—⸢qa?⸣-tar [...]

Bi-qatar [...];

r 14'14'

ma-tar—x-x-[...]

Atar-... [...];

r 15'15'

ma-tar-[...]-x [...]

Atar-[...] ... [...];

r 16'16'

mna-⸢šu⸣-[ḫu—ma]-a-di DUMU [m]⸢ṣu?⸣-a-x-x-[...]

Našuhu-madi, son of PN [...];

r 17'17'

msa-⸢la?-mu?⸣—an-nu m⸢ar₂⸣-u-as—⸢ma-a-di⸣ [...]

Salamu-annu, Aruas-madi [...];

r 18'18'

mna-šu-⸢ḫu⸣—ma-a-di DUMU [m]⸢na⸣-ni-i lu₂kar-⸢ka-di⸣-[nu]

Našuhu-madi, son of Naniyi, the victualler;

r 19'19'

m[se]-e—ma-a-di DUMU m⸢d⸣ASAR.LU₂.ḪI—BAD₃ :

Seʾ-madi, son of Asalluhi-duri, ditto (the victualler);

r 20'20'

[m]⸢AD⸣—ul—ZU DUMU mzab-di-i

Abi-ul-idi, son of Zabdiyi;

r 21'21'

[m]⸢ar₂⸣-[u]-⸢as⸣—ma-[a-di] ⸢DUMU⸣ mbi—na-na-a

Aruas-madi, son of Bi-Nanaya;

r 22'22'

[m...]-x-[...] fba-ia-a

[PN ...] Baya;

r 23'23'

[...] ⸢DUMU⸣ fa-tar—su-ri

[PN], son of Atar-suri;

r 24'24'

[...]-x-te DUMU mse-e—qa-tar

[PN], son of Se˒-qatar;

r 25'25'

[...] 1?.⸢10⸣ ANŠE A.ŠA₃ ina iriḫu-zir-ri-na

[...] 70 imēru of fields in Huzirina

Left
l.e. 1l.e. 1

mna-šu-ḫu—ma-a-di msa-[...] x-MEŠ BAR x [...]

Našuhu-madi ... [...] ... [...]

l.e. 22

a-na d15 a-⸢ši⸣-[bat iriḫu-zir]-ri-na [...]

to Ištar who dwells in Huzirina [...].

1Text has TAR instead of NU.
